cookies.metaDescription: DOAPP cookie policy and tracking technologies
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.s1p1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the site owners.
cookies.s1p2: At DOAPP, we use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, provide essential features, and analyze the use of our platform.
cookies.s2_1p: These cookies are essential for you to navigate the platform and use its features. Without these cookies, the requested services cannot be provided.
cookies.s2_1li1: Authentication: Keep your session logged in while you browse
cookies.s2_1li2: Security: Protect against CSRF and XSS attacks
cookies.s2_1dur: ⏱️ Duration: Session or until you close the browser
cookies.s2_2p: These cookies allow the platform to remember the choices you make to provide enhanced and more personal features.
cookies.s2_2li2: Visual theme: Save your light/dark mode preference
cookies.s2_3p: These cookies collect information about how visitors use the platform. The information is anonymous and is used to improve how the site works.
cookies.s3p: Some of our services use third-party cookies to provide specific features:
cookies.mpDesc: To process payments securely. Cookies necessary for transaction processing and fraud prevention.
cookies.redisDesc: For caching and improving the platform's performance. Does not collect personal information.
cookies.s4p: In addition to cookies, we use the browser's local storage technologies:
cookies.s4li1: Local Storage: To save preferences that persist between sessions (theme, language)
cookies.s4li2: Session Storage: For temporary data during the current session
cookies.s4li3: IndexedDB: To store cache of non-sensitive data that improves performance
cookies.s5p: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can manage cookies in several ways:
cookies.s5_1p: Most browsers accept cookies automatically, but you can change the settings to reject them:
cookies.s5_1firefox: Firefox: Preferences → Privacy and security → Cookies and site data
cookies.s5_1safari: Safari: Preferences → Privacy → Cookies and website data
cookies.s5_1edge: Edge: Settings → Privacy, search and services → Cookies
cookies.s5_2p: You can delete all cookies stored on your device. Keep in mind that this will log you out and delete your saved preferences.
cookies.s5Warning: ⚠️ Important: If you block or delete necessary cookies, some DOAPP features may not work correctly. For example, you won't be able to stay logged in.
cookies.s7p1: We may update this Cookie Policy occasionally to reflect changes in the cookies we use or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.
cookies.s7p2: We recommend that you review this page periodically to stay informed about our use of cookies. The "Last updated" date at the top of the document indicates when it was last revised.
cookies.s8p: If you have questions about our Cookie Policy, contact us at:
cookies.control: Your control: By using DOAPP, you accept the use of cookies as described in this policy. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.

privacy.metaDescription: DOAPP privacy policy and data protection
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: At DOAPP, we collect different types of information to provide you with a better service:
privacy.s1_3li2: Messages and communications on the platform
privacy.s2p: We use the collected information to:
privacy.s2li5: Send important notifications about your account
privacy.s2li6: Personalize your experience on the platform
privacy.s2li7: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.s3p: We do not sell your personal information. We share information only in the following cases:
privacy.s3li1: With other users: Your public profile, ratings, and portfolio are visible to other users
privacy.s3li2: Service providers: MercadoPago for payment processing, email services, etc.
privacy.s3li3: Legal compliance: When required by law or to protect our rights
privacy.s3li4: Business transfers: In the event of a merger, sale, or reorganization
privacy.s4p: We implement security measures to protect your information:
privacy.s4li1: Encryption of sensitive data (passwords, banking information)
privacy.s5p: In accordance with Argentina's Personal Data Protection Law (Law 25.326), you have the right to:
privacy.s5li1: Access: Request a copy of your personal information
privacy.s5li3: Deletion: Request the deletion of your information (subject to legal limitations)
privacy.s5li4: Objection: Object to the processing of your data for certain purposes
privacy.s5li5: Portability: Receive your data in a structured, transferable format
privacy.s5contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@doapp.com
privacy.s6p: We use cookies and similar technologies to:
privacy.s6li3: Analyze the use of the platform
privacy.s6more: For more information, see our <lnk>Cookie Policy</lnk>.
privacy.s7p: We keep your personal information while:
privacy.s7li2: It is necessary to provide services
privacy.s7li3: We have legal obligations to retain it
privacy.s7li4: It is necessary to resolve disputes
privacy.s7note: After deleting your account, we will retain certain information as required by law (accounting records, transaction history for audits).
privacy.s8p: DOAPP is not directed at people under 18 years of age. We do not intentionally collect information from minors. If we discover that we have collected information from a minor, we will delete it immediately.
privacy.s9p: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through:
privacy.s9li1: A prominent notice on the platform
privacy.s9li3: Updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this document
privacy.s10p: For questions about this privacy policy or the handling of your data:
privacy.s10note: You may also file a complaint with Argentina's Agency for Access to Public Information (AAIP).
privacy.commitment: Privacy commitment: At DOAPP we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. If you have any questions or concerns, don't hesitate to contact us.

disputeRes.metaDescription: DOAPP dispute resolution and mediation process
disputeRes.title: Dispute Resolution
disputeRes.s1p1: At DOAPP, we strive to provide a safe and fair environment for all transactions. However, we understand that disagreements can arise between people within the app. This document sets out the formal dispute resolution process.
disputeRes.s1p2: Our goal is to resolve all conflicts fairly, transparently, and efficiently, protecting the interests of both parties.
disputeRes.s2p: You should consider starting a dispute in the following situations:
disputeRes.s2c1: The delivered work does not match what was agreed in the details
disputeRes.s2c2: The Doer did not complete the work according to the specifications
disputeRes.s2c3: The Doer missed the deadlines without valid justification
disputeRes.s2c4: The quality of the work is significantly lower than expected
disputeRes.s2c5: The Doer does not respond to communications for an extended period
disputeRes.s2w1: The client does not approve the completed work without a valid reason
disputeRes.s2w2: The client requests changes not included in the original agreement
disputeRes.s2w3: The client does not provide information needed to complete the work
disputeRes.s2w4: The client unjustifiably rejects work that was delivered correctly
disputeRes.s2tip: 💡 Recommendation: Before starting a formal dispute, we recommend trying to resolve the problem directly with the other party through the platform's messaging. Many conflicts are resolved through direct communication.
disputeRes.step1p: Either party can start a dispute from the contract page by clicking "Open Dispute". You will need to provide:
disputeRes.step1note: ⏱️ The contract funds are automatically frozen until the dispute is resolved
disputeRes.step2p: The other party is notified and has 48 hours to respond with:
disputeRes.step3p: Our mediation team reviews all the evidence presented:
disputeRes.step4p: The DOAPP team issues a decision that may include:
disputeRes.step4li1: Full release: The full payment is released to the Doer
disputeRes.step4li2: Full refund: The full amount is returned to the client
disputeRes.step4li3: Partial refund: The payment is split as appropriate
disputeRes.step4li4: Deadline extension: More time is granted to complete the work
disputeRes.s4p: For a fair resolution, it is important to provide clear evidence. Examples of valid evidence:
disputeRes.s4warning: ⚠️ Important: All communication related to the contract must take place through the DOAPP platform. Off-platform communications cannot be verified and will carry less weight in the resolution.
disputeRes.s5p: Our team bases its decisions on the following criteria:
disputeRes.s5li1: Contract terms: Compliance with what was originally agreed
disputeRes.s5li2: Work quality: Whether it meets reasonable professional standards
disputeRes.s5li3: Communication: Collaborative and professional attitude of both parties
disputeRes.s5li5: Requested changes: Whether they were included in the original agreement
disputeRes.s5li6: History: Previous behavior of the parties on the platform
disputeRes.s6p: If you disagree with the initial decision, you can request an appeal within 72 hours of the resolution. To appeal, you must:
disputeRes.s6li1: Provide new evidence not previously submitted
disputeRes.s6li2: Clearly explain why you believe the decision was incorrect
disputeRes.s6note: A different team member will review the appeal. The appeal decision is final and cannot be appealed.
disputeRes.s7p: Users with multiple disputes may face:
disputeRes.s7li1: First lost dispute: Warning on the profile
disputeRes.fraudText: Starting false or malicious disputes will result in immediate account suspension and possible legal action.
disputeRes.s8p: To minimize the possibility of disputes, we recommend:
disputeRes.s9p: In complex cases, DOAPP may suggest additional mediation before issuing a final decision. This may include:
disputeRes.s9li1: Video call with both parties and a mediator
disputeRes.s9li3: Technical review by external experts (in specific cases)
disputeRes.s10p: To start a dispute or for questions about the process:
disputeRes.s10li1: From the platform: "Open Dispute" button on the contract page
disputeRes.commitment: DOAPP's commitment: We are committed to resolving all disputes fairly, impartially, and transparently. Our goal is to protect the legitimate interests of both parties and maintain trust in our platform.
disputeRes.remember: Remember: The best dispute is the one avoided through good communication and professionalism.

termsPage.metaDescription: General terms and conditions of use of the DOAPP platform
termsPage.title: General Terms and Conditions of Use
termsPage.intro1: These Terms and Conditions (hereinafter, the "Terms") govern access to and use of the digital platform called DOAPP (hereinafter, the "Platform") by any natural or legal person who registers and/or uses its services (hereinafter, the "User").
termsPage.intro2: Use of the Platform implies full and unreserved acceptance of these Terms, which constitute a valid and binding contract in accordance with articles 958 and related articles of the National Civil and Commercial Code.
termsPage.s1p: The Platform is operated by DOAPP, with legal domicile in the Argentine Republic (hereinafter, "DOAPP").
termsPage.s2p: DOAPP is a digital technological intermediation platform, under the marketplace and social network model, that connects:
termsPage.s2li1: Clients: natural or legal persons who demand services.
termsPage.s2li2: Workers / Doers: natural persons who offer professional services or trades independently.
termsPage.s2note: DOAPP does NOT provide the published services, is NOT an employer, does NOT act as a party to the service contract, its role being limited to facilitating technological tools for contact, payment management, custody of funds, and dispute mediation.
termsPage.s3p1: 3.1. Workers register and act as independent and autonomous providers, without any employment, corporate, dependency, mandate, agency, or franchise relationship with DOAPP.
termsPage.s3p2: 3.2. Each contract entered into through the Platform is concluded exclusively between Client and Worker, who fully assume the rights and obligations arising from it.
termsPage.s3p3: 3.3. DOAPP does not exercise technical, disciplinary, or organizational control over the Workers, limiting itself to Platform usage rules.
termsPage.s4p1: 4.1. Access to the Platform requires prior registration and creation of a personal account.
termsPage.s4p2: 4.2. The User guarantees the truthfulness, accuracy, and updating of the data provided.
termsPage.s4p3: 4.3. DOAPP may require identity verification processes (KYC), including validation of email, phone, identity document, and tax data, especially for PRO and SUPER PRO memberships.
termsPage.s5p: The Platform allows the publication and hiring of services, among others:
termsPage.s5note: DOAPP does not guarantee the suitability, quality, outcome, or legality of the services offered.
termsPage.s6p1: 6.1. The hiring cycle includes: publication, application, acceptance, payment, execution, confirmation by a platform administrator, and completion.
termsPage.s6p2: 6.2. The acceptance by the Worker and the Client generates a binding digital contract between them.
termsPage.s6p3: 6.3. The system requires bilateral confirmation of completion for the release of funds.
termsPage.s7p1: 7.1. Payments are processed through MercadoPago, accepting the methods enabled by that provider.
termsPage.s7p2: 7.2. DOAPP acts as custodian of funds (escrow), holding the money until the service is confirmed.
termsPage.s7p3: 7.3. DOAPP charges a commission for the use of the Platform, according to the User's plan:
termsPage.s7p4: 7.4. Minimum commission: for contracts under $8,000 ARS, a fixed commission of $1,000 ARS will apply.
termsPage.s7p5: 7.5. DOAPP's commission is non-refundable, even in cases of cancellation or dispute.
termsPage.s7p6: 7.6. Automatic release due to Client absence: If a job ends (due date reached) and the Client does not confirm receipt of the service within the following 2 (two) hours, the payment held in custody will be automatically released to the assigned Workers. The Platform commission corresponding to the Client's plan is retained in all cases. The Client will receive notifications before and during this process. This clause does not apply if there is an active dispute over the contract.
termsPage.s7p7: 7.7. Workers will be notified before the start of the work, during its execution, and at the time of payment release. In the event of the Client's absence in accordance with point 7.6, Workers will receive immediate notice by email and notification on the Platform.
termsPage.s8p1: 8.1. DOAPP offers FREE, PRO, and SUPER PRO plans, with automatic monthly renewal.
termsPage.s8p2: 8.2. Cancellation does not generate a refund and the benefits remain until the expiration of the paid period.
termsPage.s8p3: 8.3. DOAPP may modify prices, notifying the User in advance.
termsPage.s9p1: 9.1. Cancellations prior to acceptance by a platform Administrator: full refund.
termsPage.s9p2: 9.2. Cancellations up to 24 hours before the start: refund of the amount minus commission, provided the publication has not been accepted by a platform administrator.
termsPage.s9p3: 9.3. Late cancellations or during execution: proportional distribution as established in the Platform, with retention of commissions.
termsPage.s10p1: 10.1. DOAPP acts as an internal mediator, without jurisdictional character.
termsPage.s10p2: 10.2. Opening a dispute freezes the funds until its resolution.
termsPage.s10p3: 10.3. The Administrator's decisions may consist of full release, full refund, partial refund, or closure without action. To reach the final resolution, the information voluntarily submitted by the parties about the hiring conditions will be used.
termsPage.s10p4: 10.4. The Platform commission is not refunded under any circumstances.
termsPage.s11li1: The quality, execution, or outcome of the services.
termsPage.s11li2: Personal, material, or property damages arising from the provision.
termsPage.s11p2: 11.2. The User releases DOAPP from any claim arising from their contractual relationship with other Users.
termsPage.s12p1: 12.1. Workers are responsible for issuing the corresponding invoices and complying with their tax obligations before AFIP.
termsPage.s12p2: 12.2. DOAPP may issue an invoice for the collection of its commissions.
termsPage.s13p1: 13.1. DOAPP complies with Law 25.326 on Personal Data Protection.
termsPage.s13p2: 13.2. Banking and identity data are stored in encrypted form.
termsPage.s13p3: 13.3. The User may exercise the rights of access, rectification, deletion, and objection.
termsPage.s14p: DOAPP may offer advertising spaces subject to availability, prior approval, and advance payment.
termsPage.s15p: DOAPP may apply warnings, suspensions, or permanent cancellation of accounts in the event of breaches, fraud, or misuse of the Platform.
termsPage.s16p: DOAPP may modify these Terms, which will take effect from their publication.
termsPage.s17p: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic. For consumers, the court of the User's domicile will have jurisdiction in accordance with Law 24.240.
termsPage.s18p: The User declares to have read, understood, and fully accepted these Terms and Conditions.
termsPage.importantNote: Important note: By registering and using DOAPP, you confirm that you have read, understood, and accepted these Terms and Conditions in full.
termsPage.acceptAndBack: I accept the terms, go back

help.title: Help
help.tutorialDesc: Watch the interactive tutorial that guides you through DOAPP's main features.
help.contactSupportDesc: Have a problem or question? Create a support ticket and we'll help you.
help.helpCenterDesc: Find answers to frequently asked questions and usage guides.

faq.howItWorksAnswer: DOAPP connects clients who need services with independent workers. The client posts a job, workers apply with proposals, the client chooses the best profile, and payment is protected on our platform until both parties confirm the work is completed.
faq.moneyProtectionAnswer: When you pay for a job, the money is securely held on our platform. It is only released to the worker when both parties confirm the service was completed correctly. If there's a problem, you can open a dispute.
faq.commissions: How much does DOAPP charge in commission?
faq.commissionsAnswer: FREE plan: 8% commission. PRO plan ($4,999/month): 3%. SUPER PRO plan ($8,999/month): 1%. The first 1000 users receive 3 commission-free publications.
faq.howToPublish: How do I post a job?
faq.howToPublishAnswer: Click 'Post a Job' in the top menu. Fill in the title, description, budget, and dates. Then make the publication payment and an administrator will approve your job to make it visible.
faq.howToApply: How do I apply for a job?
faq.howToApplyAnswer: Browse available jobs on the main page. When you find one you're interested in, click 'Apply' and send your proposal with a message and suggested price.
faq.howToGetPaid: How do I get paid for my work?
faq.howToGetPaidAnswer: When a job is completed, both parties confirm completion. The payment is credited to your DOAPP balance. You can withdraw it to your bank account (CBU) with a minimum of $1,000 ARS.
faq.problemWithJob: What do I do if there's a problem with a job?
faq.problemWithJobAnswer: You can open a dispute from the contract detail. An administrator will review the case and make a fair decision based on evidence from both parties. Meanwhile, the money remains held.
faq.confirmationSystem: How does the confirmation system work?
faq.confirmationSystemAnswer: When the work is done, both parties must confirm. If one party doesn't confirm within 2 hours, the system automatically confirms and releases the payment.

finance.avgTicketHelp: What you charge on average per job. To earn more you can raise your price or take on more jobs.
finance.pipelineHelp: Money from jobs already underway that you haven't collected yet.
finance.monotributoHelp: Monotributo has an annual billing limit based on your category. If you exceed it, you must recategorize. This is a guideline: confirm your category with your accountant.
finance.monthlyHelp: How much you billed each month over the last year. It helps you see your best and worst months (seasonality).
finance.quarterlyHelp: How much you billed in each quarter of the year. Useful for organizing your filings.
finance.topClientsHelp: The clients who billed you the most this year. If a single one concentrates too much, it's wise to diversify so you don't depend on them.
finance.noClients: You have no clients yet this year.
finance.noInvoices: You have no billed jobs yet.
finance.disclaimer: This information is for guidance only and does not constitute accounting or tax advice. For any questions about your obligations (monotributo, recategorization, IIBB), consult your accountant.
finance.fiscalIntro: Tell us how you invoice so we can show you your cap and warn you before you exceed it. You can change it anytime.
finance.capHelp: You can find your annual cap on AFIP, under your monotributo category. If you don't know it, ask your accountant.
finance.obligationsIntro: A quick guide so nothing takes you by surprise.
finance.obWhatIs: It's a simplified regime to pay your taxes as an independent worker. You pay a fixed monthly fee based on your category, which covers taxes and contributions.
finance.obRecat: In January and July, AFIP looks at what you billed over the last 12 months. If you billed more, you move to a higher category (a more expensive fee). That's why we show you how much of the cap you've used.
finance.obIibb: It's a provincial tax. Depending on your province, you may have to register and declare it separately from monotributo.
finance.obDue: The monotributo fee is due every month (generally around the 20th). Paying it on time avoids surcharges and keeps your category up to date.
finance.completionHelp: Of the jobs you started, how many you finished well. The higher it is, the more trust you build.
finance.disputesHelp: Number of jobs that ended in a dispute. Keeping it at zero is the best calling card.
finance.howRatedHelp: The average of the scores your clients left you in each aspect. It helps you see where you're strong and what you can improve.
finance.noBadges: Complete more jobs to earn badges that build trust with your clients.
finance.licenseTrust: A verified license shows you as a licensed professional and builds more trust.
finance.licenseExpired: Your license has expired. Renew it to stay licensed.
finance.licenseExpiringSoon: Expires in {{days}} days. Remember to renew it.
finance.whyProf: Adding and verifying your license shows you as a licensed professional, sets you apart from the competition, and helps you get better jobs. Plus, we warn you before it expires so you don't end up unlicensed.
finance.exportHelp: Download a CSV with all your invoices for the year for your accountant.
finance.winRateHelp: Of every proposal you send, how many get accepted. If it's low, review your price and personalize your proposals more.
finance.conversionHelp: Of the accepted proposals, how many ended in a completed job.
finance.funnelHelp: The journey of your opportunities: how many proposals you sent, how many were accepted, and how many became jobs. It helps you see where opportunities slip away.
finance.noTips: Send your first proposal to start receiving personalized recommendations.
finance.monthlyGoalHelp: Set a goal for how much you want to bill this month and track your progress. It helps you keep the pace and stay motivated.
finance.profileViewsHelp: How many times other people viewed your profile (and how many unique). It's the start of the funnel: more views = more chances of getting hired.

proUsage.notPro: This feature is only available for PRO members
proUsage.subtitlePro: Manage your monthly contracts with a reduced commission
proUsage.professionalCenterDesc: Your invoicing, taxes, reputation, and license — explained simply.
proUsage.contractsResetMonthly: Contracts reset on the 1st of each month
proUsage.bonusUnlockedDesc: 🎉 Congratulations! You completed 3 contracts this month and earned 1 extra commission-free posting.
proUsage.bonusAboutToEarn: ✨ You're about to earn 1 bonus contract! Complete these contracts to unlock it.
proUsage.bonusProgressDesc: Complete 3 contracts this month to earn 1 extra commission-free posting.
proUsage.benefit3Contracts: 3 monthly contracts with just {{pct}} commission (vs 8% normal)
proUsage.benefitBonus: Bonus of 1 commission-free posting when you complete 3 contracts in the month
proUsage.benefitBadge: Verified {{tier}} badge and priority in searches
proUsage.benefitStats: Advanced statistics and identity document verification

jobPayment.minContractDesc: The budget is under $8,000 ARS. The publication commission will be $1,000 ARS (minimum commission).
jobPayment.tip1: Ask the worker to show you their verification code when starting the job to confirm their identity.
jobPayment.tip2: The publication commission is non-refundable once the listing has been approved.
jobPayment.tip3: You can cancel until the job starts. With more than 2 hours notice you're refunded the job price; with 2 hours or less, half the price is refunded to you and the other half to the worker. If there's still no worker selected, you're refunded the full price (the commission is not refunded).
jobPayment.tip4: Describe the job in as much detail as possible: needed materials, access to the location, exact schedule. Avoid misunderstandings.
jobPayment.tip5: All communication and price negotiation must happen within the platform to stay protected.
jobPayment.tip6: If the job isn't completed correctly, you can open a dispute and the money stays held in escrow until resolved.
jobPayment.tip7: After the job is completed, remember to leave a review: it helps other clients and improves the ecosystem.
jobPayment.uploadBinanceProof: Upload a screenshot of the Binance receipt in PNG or JPG format.
jobPayment.proofClearHint: Make sure the Transaction ID, amount, and date are clearly visible.
jobPayment.publishAfterApproval5: The job will be published once the payment is approved (5-15 min).
jobPayment.have24h: You have 24 hours to upload the receipt.
jobPayment.uploadFromJobView: You can also upload it from the job view.
jobPayment.publishAfterApproval: The job will be published once the payment is approved.

autoSelect.willBeAssigned: Your job "{{jobTitle}}" will be automatically assigned in {{hours}} hours because there's only 1 proposal.
autoSelect.optionConfirm: Confirm now and close the applications
autoSelect.optionPause: Pause the job to fix your schedule or wait for more proposals
autoSelect.workerOnlyApplicant: You are the only applicant for "{{jobTitle}}". You will be automatically assigned in {{hours}} hours.
autoSelect.workerPrepare: Get ready: make sure you're available from the agreed time.
autoSelect.whatItMeans: What it means: You are the only applicant for "{{jobTitle}}". If the client doesn't select another worker before this time, you'll be automatically assigned.
autoSelect.prepareInfo: Get ready: Make sure you're available to start the job on its scheduled date and time.

myDisputes.noDisputesInCategory: You have no disputes in this category

myDisputes.tipBugs: Bug reports: Technical problems on the platform
myDisputes.tipOther: Other: Any other issue you need to report

completeReg.title: Complete your registration
completeReg.subtitle: We need to verify your identity with your ID
completeReg.greeting: Hi {{name}}, upload your ID to keep using the platform.
completeReg.photosHint: Photos must be clear and legible. They will be verified by the team.
completeReg.privacyNote: Your data is protected and will not be shared with third parties. The ID is required by Argentine regulations.
completeReg.errorOnlyImages: Only images (JPG, PNG) or PDF are accepted
completeReg.errorBothPhotos: You must upload both the front and back photo of your ID
